activities_projects.title: Constructing Quadrilaterals from Sides and Angles
activities_projects.objective: Construct quadrilaterals using given sides and angles
steps: Take given sides and angles of a quadrilateral
Construct the quadrilateral accurately using ruler and compass

activities_projects.title: Verifying Angle Sum Property
activities_projects.objective: Verify that the sum of interior angles of any quadrilateral is 360°
steps: Add the angles to check the sum is 360°
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Practical verification of quadrilateral angle property

activities_projects.title: Exploring Diagonals and Their Properties
activities_projects.objective: Understand diagonal properties in parallelogram, rectangle, rhombus, and square
steps: Observe properties such as equality, bisecting angles, and intersection point

activities_projects.title: Proving Properties of Parallelogram
activities_projects.objective: Verify opposite sides, opposite angles, and diagonal properties experimentally
steps: Draw diagonals and observe bisecting properties

activities_projects.title: Constructing Rhombus with Given Diagonals
activities_projects.objective: Construct rhombus using diagonals and verify properties
steps: Draw diagonals perpendicular to each other
Construct rhombus using intersection as center
Verify all sides are equal and diagonals bisect each other
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct construction and property verification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Area Calculation Using Different Methods
activities_projects.objective: Calculate area of quadrilaterals using formula and diagonal method
steps: Calculate area using formula for base × height and 1/2 × product of diagonals
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies multiple methods for area calculation

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Quadrilateral Project
activities_projects.objective: Identify and analyze quadrilaterals in surroundings
steps: Observe quadrilateral shapes around home, school, or park
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects quadrilateral concepts to real-life examples
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevant examples and correct labeling (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Constructing Trapezium
activities_projects.objective: Construct trapezium using given sides and height
steps: Use compass and protractor to locate other vertices
Verify properties such as parallel sides and non-parallel sides

activities_projects.title: Diagonals in Special Quadrilaterals
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how diagonals behave in square, rectangle, rhombus, and parallelogram
steps: Measure lengths and angles at intersection

activities_projects.title: Project: Designing a Quadrilateral Garden Plot
activities_projects.objective: Apply quadrilateral concepts in practical design
steps: Plan a garden with quadrilateral boundary
Draw to scale on graph paper
Mark vertices, sides, diagonals, and area calculations
Apply properties of square, rectangle, or rhombus as needed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Integrates geometry concepts into a real-life project
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, design clarity, and application of properties (10 marks)
